items.title: What is interesting is if the Knicks finish this off: with an expenive, aging core we may actually get to live in the moment of a singular title, run ➡️an NBA off-season where people are not anointing another dynasty & declaring the league over for the next five years.

items.title: June 7, 1995: Hakeem Olajuwon's tip-in with 0:00.3 to go in OT gives Houston a 120-118 win over the Orlando Magic in Game 1 of the NBA Finals.
items.author: NBA Cobwebs
items.body_excerpt:
June 7, 1995: Hakeem Olajuwon's tip-in with 0:00.3 to go in OT gives Houston a 120-118 win over the Orlando Magic in Game 1 of the NBA Finals.

Olajuwon had 31 PTS/7 AST/6 REB/4 BLK, Clyde Drexler had 23 PTS/11 REB/7 AST and Kenny Smith had 23 PTS (7-11 3P)/9 AST for the Rockets.

items.author: TrueHoop
items.body_excerpt: Rebounding is hard. SUN YUXUAN/GETTY IMAGES 1. KNICKS WIN GAME 3, PROBABLY The emotional IQ, toughness, and pragmatism of the Knicks (or at least the ones not named Rick Brunson, more on that below) should be studied. The Spurs are much better than any team New York has played…

items.title: Jalen Brunson thrives under pressure in a way few ever have.
items.author: James L. Edwards III
items.body_excerpt:
Jalen Brunson thrives under pressure in a way few ever have. 

Because of that, and my very recent 12-round bout with anxiety, I wanted to learn more about his relationship with pressure so I can continue to better understand myself.

Free for all:

www.nytimes.com/athletic/733...

media.title: I asked Jalen Brunson about pressure to better understand my own anxiety. Here’s what he said (Gift Article)
media.description: Jalen Brunson is facing tremendous pressure to deliver a title for New York. How does he deal with it? And what can we all learn from it?

items.title: Hollander POTD Allen Iverson. Georgetown G was 1st pick in 96 by PHI. Explosive scorer who won ROY & had 5 straight 40+ point games. Criticized for being "too selfish, too out of control." Had up and down relationship w/Larry Brown but & won MVP in 01 and was a scoring machine.
